message:
feat(tests): extend db/messaging gap baseline contract tests to 32 (asupersync-2oh2u.6.1)

Add 14 new contract tests for the database and messaging gap baseline:
- severity distribution validation (Critical/High/Medium/Low counts)
- summary table completeness (all 52 gaps present)
- cross-reference between per-domain sections and summary table
- phase assignment validation (A/B/C/D) with critical-in-early check
- numbered reliability requirements (DR-01..06, MR-01..06)
- source file existence verification for all referenced modules
- hard/soft blocker section content validation
- tokio ecosystem equivalent naming
- feature family mapping (F18/F19) consistency
- G3 interop conditional elimination references
- revision history presence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
